prs.title: Clean up completed AWS Marketplace TODOs and remove test page
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Housekeeping PR that archives/updates TODO markdown files and removes a test page — low complexity, no logic changes.

prs.title: AWS Marketplace Integration & Credential Consolidation
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Broad AWS Marketplace integration touching schema, auth flows, onboarding, email/S3 services, environment config, and deployment files across 23 files — significant feature work with meaningful cross-cutting changes.

prs.title: Add AWS Marketplace SaaS Integration
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Initial AWS Marketplace SaaS integration introducing a new API route, marketplace pages, a shell test script, and a TODO plan — solid self-contained feature foundation despite moderate line count after stripping vendored code.

prs.title: SM-141: returns values instead of numbers
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Single-file fix to return human-readable values instead of raw numbers in an AWS partner badges collector — simple targeted bug fix with minimal logic change.

prs.title: Ch/sm 184
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Architectural overhaul of the chat agent system introducing multiple new sub-agents (field-completion, strategy-deck, support) each with their own graph, state, tools, and sessions across 34+ files — transformative, weeks-scale work.

stories.name: AWS Marketplace Launch & Integration
stories.rationale: Delivered end-to-end AWS Marketplace SaaS integration including credential consolidation, subscription handling, and cleanup of scaffolding and test artifacts.

stories.name: AI Agent Output & Behavior Improvements
stories.rationale: Enhanced AI agent reliability by fixing value return formatting and delivering broader agent behavior improvements captured in the SM-184 initiative.
